profile_target.source: post-pass117 RCH fj-dispatch profile on ts2

candidate.lever: accumulate F64 batched Eigh outputs as dense Vec<f64> and return TensorValue::new_f64_values

decision.reason: Candidate regressed against the focused untouched-source baseline and was only 1.023x versus the broader same-worker profile row, below the Score>=2.0 keep threshold. Source diff was removed.

behavior_proof.focused_tests: RCH cargo test -p fj-dispatch test_batch_trace_eigh_multi -- --nocapture passed 7 tests in candidate state
behavior_proof.ordering: Candidate preserved batch-major output order and per-slice eigenvalue/eigenvector order before rejection.
behavior_proof.tie_breaking: No sorting tie rule was changed; the same append_eigh_decomposition/eigh_decompose_matrix_into logic produced values.
behavior_proof.floating_point: Candidate used the same decomposition and copied f64 results directly, but it was rejected for performance.
